entry.title: 🇩🇪 SAP Build: Create Apps and Processes Without Code (Hamburg, Germany)
entry.content:
This is the all-new and revised SAP CodeJam event for SAP Build low-code/no-code tooling and will give you a hands-on experience with SAP Build for building apps, business processes, and business sites without coding. 

You will get to know the environment by creating:

  • A business app for an online store (SAP Build Apps).
  • A business process for approving purchases (SAP Build Process Automation).
  • An apps landing page (SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition)
  • We will also demo desktop automations and a full business site (SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition).

Prerequisites

  • Bring your own laptop with power adapter and have a supported Web browser such as Google Chrome or Firefox installed on your laptop.
  • It can be helpful to bring a tablet or second laptop, if you have.
  • Complete these prerequisites BEFORE you come: Set Up Prerequisites for SAP Build CodeJam 

Location and Date 

This is an in-person event only (not virtual) and is planned for Monday, March 17, 2025 from 09:00 - 15:30 local time in Hamburg, Germany (CET). The language of the event and the content will be English.

Event Address: SAP Schulungszentrum Hamburg, Tesdorpfstraße 8, 20148 Hamburg, Germany, DE 

  • The instructor is SAP Developer Advocate @Dan_Wroblewski.

Please note that spaces are limited! We can only accommodate 20 attendees. If you want to attend, register by clicking the Yes button in the Will you be attending? section above to the right.

entry.title: Re: Identity and Access Management with Microsoft Entra, Part II: Provisioning to BTP and S/4HANA
entry.content:
I did some extra investigation, still a new user,  and found three options for my password issue.

1. set the profile param login/disable_password_logon to 3

2. use policies 

3. scim entry urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:sap:2.0:User passwordDetails status is disabled.

 

Option 1 will work but for now I cant predict the impact on the other users. So parked this one

Option 2 using policies I would want to push the policy with ips, but have not found out how

Option 3 I tried to implement, but am either strugling with the regex, or it is not possible to set status with the abap rfc.  Added this regex:
{
"targetPath": "$.PASSWORDDETAILS.STATUS",
"constant": "disabled"
}

Can option 3 work? The error I now get is


user:P000003,

system=S4publicAbap,

time=2025-01-30T09:16:37.112+00,

error=IDENTITY_MODIFY function returned response number 279 and errors: Enter a user name. ,

content={"ADDRESS":{"FIRSTNAME":"svguser02","LASTNAME":"jansen","TEL1_NUMBR":"888-888-8888"},"ADDSMTP":[{"E_MAIL":"svguser02@sgemert001.tst"}],"ADDTEL":[{"TELEPHONE":"888-888-8888"}],"ALIAS":{"USERALIAS":""},"DEFAULTS":{"LANGU":"E"},"LOCK":"U","LOGONDATA":{"TZONE":"CET"},"PASSWORDDETAILS":{"STATUS":"disabled"},"SAPUSER_UUID":{"SAP_UID":"d26230a1-2147-45b4-b12b-8c63f8b0c694"},"USERNAME":"P000003"}

entry.title: Clock in/clock out integration error
entry.content:
Hi all

I have a problem that I don't know if you can help me with. I have a client with a clock machine. Some of the employees do not have time evaluation, but they still clock in/clock out. Since they do not have time evaluation, I did not set the clock in group and I set the timesheet as negative so that it would be filled in automatically. What happens is that when the clocks are integrated, they get an error, because since they are not integrated into the employee, it gets an error in Manage Clock In/Clock Out. Is there any way to prevent these errors from appearing?

entry.title: Grouping of event in SAP Signavio Process intelligence
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I working on the dashboard for case-centric process mining. There is one simple outcome that I am trying to populate in the form of table.

"Activities and their respective count"

When I run the signal query "select event_name, count(*) as Numberoftimes from THIS_PROCESS. There is an outcome and it is not what I expect. I expect Activity table to have distinct activities and the count table to show respective counts. Example : Order cretated  - 32, Create Invoice - 45 likewise for all the activities.   However the output is different, the activities are grouped and they come in different combinations format.  Example : Create Sales Order, Create Invoice, Clear invoice  will have one group and their respective count as xx(any number) . Then again Create Sales Order will come in another group with different combination. Can anyone please advise why this grouping takes place and If i want to have the outcome as stated above. What i can do. Thank you

entry.title: Re: How it's like beeing a "Top ABAP Blogger"
entry.content: tag, tag

entry.title: Cutover for EC and Time Off
entry.content:
Hello All

We are preparing for Cutover activities (Test) with a full load. We are almost done with EC. For time off, we are stuck with the template to import employee data for the work schedule. Could you please advise is there any template available for Employee work schedule data import, or do we need to do it in employee Job data import 

 

Reg

SK

entry.title: Re: FOR expression in ABAP 7.40 - Best case scenarios

entry.title: Issue with HANA Cloud Instance in BTP
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

We are experiencing issues with our HANA Cloud instance in BTP today.

We attempted to start the HANA instance using SAP HANA Cloud Central, but we are unable to start it at the moment.

Has anyone else faced a similar issue? Any insights or workarounds would be appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Launching the RISE with SAP Methodology Dashboard for Your SAP Transformation Journey
entry.content:
Hi @NataliaSoltau, looks very cool! We just wanted to give it a try and activated SCMON & SUSG in our development system, however, the status is not updating. We didn't find any info on how often the status/content in CALM is updated.

BR,

Mark

entry.title: Email Notifications are not triggering for Payment Batch Approval Process
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are using the S4 Hana Public Edition 

Our client needs one level check in payment approval. So, we configured activity in "Send Email to Payment Batch Approvers" for your information please find the below screenshot.

Configured same as mentioned in below link.

Manage Email Notifications for Payment Batch Approvers | SAP Help Portal

We are not able to generate the email notification for receiver mail id , but we are able to see the notification in system user level.
and also, please find the below screenshot we find while doing configuration

Please let us know, is there any work around for this issue, it will be more helpful to us.

Thank you in advance.

Best Regards,
Nandini

Samaritana Silva

entry.title: EHS jobs integration with HR
entry.content:
hi, 

I've been working with job hazard analysis. My question is that, is there a way to integrate jobs assigned to positions in the HR module to the manage jobs of EHS. Something like the location structure that is imported from PM. Can we import jobs from HR into manage jobs of EHS? It seems illogical that we should create jobs 2 times in the system.

entry.title: Re: Usage of the Standard Carrier Alpha Code (SCAC) in SAP TM
entry.content:
Hello Michael,

we have the same issue as jiteshmehta mentioned above: 

2. same SCAC can be assigned to multiple bp records(Carriers) ? 

The use case is, that we have a general contract with a shipping line and have three different purchase orgs. (region Americas, Europe, Asia) thus we want to use one SCAC code but we have to pay to three different BPs in the regions.

Best regards,

Uwe

entry.title: SAP MaxAttention Summit 2025
entry.content:
We look forward to welcoming you at the SAP MaxAttention Summit 2025, taking place April 13-15 in Munich, Germany. 

From Sunday evening through Tuesday afternoon, the summit will feature captivating keynotes from SAP executives, customer experience sessions, and in-depth expert discussions. In addition, there will be a variety of networking opportunities, including a welcome reception, a special evening event, and one-on-one meetings.

  • Take the opportunity to connect with members of the SAP Executive Board and engage in in-depth expert discussions.
  • Participants will be able to experience SAP MaxAttention in action and learn how leading companies within the SAP MaxAttention community establish their individual North Star enterprise architecture, transition to RISE with SAP, and integrate innovations like SAP Business AI.
  • Moreover, the summit provides you with a chance to connect with a select group of SAP's largest customers, to build relationships, and to gain valuable insights that can take your business to the next level.

To obtain further details regarding the SAP MaxAttention Summit 2025, please visit this blog post that encompasses essential resources. This blog post will be regularly updated with the latest information, such as the agenda and speaker details.

entry.content:

thanks

entry.title: Re: How to create custom button in TMG
entry.content:
If I click on one record and If I click on custom button, the button is removing by default, it is not holding the button. why?

Thank you,
Mohan.

entry.title: SAP CAP(Java) cds infix filter
entry.content:
Hi!

Looking for support about infix filters in cds in a SAP CAP Java project. I have the following entity structure (simplified view):

entiy ![Case] : cuid, managed {
roles : Association to many RoleUserMap
on roles.caseID = $self;
}
entity RoleUserMap : cuid, managed {
caseID : Association to one ![Case];
roleName : RoleType;
userIDExternal : String(100);
user : Association to one User;
}

@CDS.persistence.skip
entity User {
key ID : String(100);
userName: String(200);
email: String(200);
givenName : String(20);
familyName : String(20);

}

In order to make view in a service more detailed was applied the following view (contains more then that fields)
entity Cases as
select from casemanager.Case {
roles[roleName = 'REQUESTER'].user as requesters,
roles[roleName = 'MAINTENANCE_TECHNICIAN'].user as maintenanceTechnicians,
}

My assumption was that it will return an array of users but returns one entity. But when I try to edit it like 'roles[roleName = 'REQUESTER'] as requesterRoles,' it works correctly and returns a list.

May be you can provide some workaround on that or is it a bug to report?
Thank you in advance!

entry.title: SAP Build Apps: Inline Frame remove sandbox attribute
entry.content:
Hi all,

i want to create an app, where visitors can do a "self" check-in.

Therefore they have to read a pdf-file for safety instructions.
The Browser runs on Kiosk mode, so the modal PDF-Preview is not that great for my use case.

Thats why I've created a small http server which hosts the pdf-file localy to display it.

In my SAP Build App I tried to display the pdf via the Inline Frame (iFrame), but Chrome is everytime saying, that it is blocked by Chrome:

"This site was blocked by Chrome"

I found out, that this has to do with the sandbox attribute of the HTML iFrame.
It sets the sandbox attribute everytime, as well when I'm not setting anything:

It also not works, when I am adding every value:
allow-downloads allow-forms allow-modals allow-orientation-lock allow-pointer-lock allow-popups allow-popups-to-escape-sandbox allow-presentation allow-same-origin allow-scripts allow-storage-access-by-user-activation Experimental allow-top-navigation allow-top-navigation-by-user-activation allow-top-navigation-to-custom-protocols

When I remove the sandbox attribute by myself in the developer console, and right clicking "reload frame", it is showing my pdf like it should 🙂

 

Is there a way to remove the attribute? Or a workaround for that?

 

Thanks,

Vincent

entry.title: Re: CDS View Supplier Invoice Change History
entry.content:
Hi @maugustin,

 

What CDS and join did you used? 

 

Thanks

Anmol

entry.title: Enterprise Portfolio and Project Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502
entry.content:
In this blog post I’d like to outline the innovations for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 in the area of Enterprise Portfolio and Project Management. These are the topics that are covered: 

  • Staffing Resources in Enterprise Projects Using SAP Project and Resource Management (4RF*)  
  • End-to-End Project Cost Visibility: Enhancements in Project Cost Report (1NT*) 
  • Maintain WBS Element Milestones (1NT*) 

Check out my video to get a glimpse of the new features: 

The world of project management is constantly evolving, with new tools and software updates enhancing the efficiency and effectiveness of project delivery. With the latest release of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502, enterprise project managers and financial controllers are in for a treat. Two standout enhancements are set to revolutionize the way project costs and milestones are managed: the Project Cost Report enhancements and the ability to maintain milestones at the Work Breakdown Structure (WBS) element level. Moreover, we’re providing an integration with SAP Project and Resource Management which allows for the staffing of resources in enterprise projects using an external resource management solution.  

Let's dive into these features and explore their benefits for users. 

 

Staffing Resources in Enterprise Projects Using SAP Project and Resource Management  

In today's fast-paced business environment, efficient resource management is crucial for the success of enterprise projects. Utilizing an external resource management solution can significantly streamline the staffing process, ensuring that the right people with the right skills are assigned to the projects when needed. SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition seamlessly integrates with SAP Project and Resource Management to simplify this task.  
 
Enterprise projects often have intricate staffing needs, requiring specific skills and timely availability. The integration between SAP S/4HANA Cloud and SAP Project and Resource Management addresses these complexities by enabling a seamless flow of resource requests. Project managers can create detailed resource requests, specifying necessary skills, availability, and relevant project timelines. Once these requests are published, resource managers take over and match resources to requests based on skill fit and availability. Leveraging visualization and filtering options as well as the AI-assisted matching of employees to projects ensures optimal staffing for projects.  

Figure 1: The integration of SAP Project and Resource Management increases transparency regarding resource utilization.   

 
Benefits  
 
1. Enhanced Flexibility: This integration supports both direct and external staffing. While direct staffing is used for internal employees associated with the same cost center, external staffing allows for broader resource planning using external solutions, regardless of cost center allocations. 
 
2. Real-Time Updates: Upon a hard booking of a resource, all staffing information is updated in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition in real-time. This ensures transparency and up-to-date workforce utilization, aiding managers in making informed decisions. 
 
3. Comprehensive Visibility: Utilizing the “Manage My Timesheet” application, employees can access tasks related to their assignments, streamlining time tracking and ensuring accurate project accounting. 
 
The integration with SAP Project and Resource Management can significantly optimize resource staffing for enterprise projects. By leveraging this integration, enterprises can achieve a higher level of efficiency and accuracy in managing their project teams, ultimately leading to successful project outcomes. For detailed configuration guidance, users should refer to the SAP Help Portal and specific user guides available for SAP Project and Resource Management. 

If you want to find out about more highlights in this area, please check out the latest blog post by my colleague Katharina Stopf.   

 

 

 
End-to-End Project Cost Visibility 

In large-scale enterprise projects, maintaining clear visibility over project costs is crucial. Traditionally, project cost reports primarily focused on commitment costs directly associated with the project's consumption. This left a gap in understanding the ongoing and real-time insights related to project stock commitment costs and inventory-related costs that were in project stock but not yet consumed. 

With the latest enhancements in the Project Cost Report, we’re closing the last gaps in achieving end-to-end project cost visibility. The inclusion of two new columns – one for commitments related to project stock and one for inventory costs – brings a more comprehensive picture to project managers and financial controllers.  

Take a look at the demo to find out more.  

Figure 2: Providing full visibility into all cost types throughout the project’s execution cycle.   

 
Benefits  

  1. Holistic View of Project Stock Commitment Costs: The updated report provides insights into commitment costs that are tied to project stock, allowing project managers to anticipate future expenses better and plan accordingly. 
  2. Visibility of Inventory-related Costs: Users can now track inventory costs for materials not yet issued to the project. This feature helps in forecasting project expenses and ensuring resources are adequately allocated where needed. 
  3. Aggregated and non-aggregated Views: Depending on the analysis requirements, users can opt for either a detailed or summary view of the costs, offering flexibility in reporting. 

Figure 3: Two new columns as part of the Project Cost Report allow for insights into project stock commitment costs and inventory-related costs.   

 
These enhancements offer users greater transparency and control over project finances. By having all relevant costs visible in a single report, financial discrepancies can be minimized, and more accurate and timely project-financial decisions can be made. This improvement ultimately aids in budgeting accuracy and effective financial resource management, aligning with an organization's strategic financial goals. 
 

 

 

Maintain WBS Element Milestones 

Tracking project progress via milestones is key in ensuring timely project completion. However, managing milestones solely at the project level can often mean missing out on the granularity and detailed tracking needed for larger projects that use multiple WBS elements. 
 

With the introduction of milestones at the WBS element level, users can now create, manage, and track milestones specific to smaller components of the project.  

Figure 4: When maintaining milestones at WBS element level, they can be flagged as “Main Milestone” if it’s essential for the project planning. 

Benefits

  1. Track Progress at a Granular Level: By creating milestones for each WBS element, project managers can monitor the progress of each project component more precisely. 
  2. Flexibility and Precision in Planning: Milestones in the WBS element allow for more precise scheduling and resource allocation, ensuring each project component meets its deadlines. 
  3. Enhanced Project Tracking and Reporting: With milestones now visible at finer levels, the project progress and status become clearer and can be reported with greater accuracy. 
     
    The ability to define milestones at the WBS level enhances the foresight and control project managers have over a project's lifecycle. By providing clear checkpoints at various stages of the project, potential issues can be identified and resolved earlier, ensuring projects stay on track. This feature is particularly beneficial for large, complex projects where detailed oversight is crucial for success. 
     

 
The latest enhancements in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition for Enterprise Portfolio and Project Management are set to revolutionize the way projects are managed. With more detailed insights into project costs and the ability to track progress at the WBS level, these features empower project managers and financial controllers with the tools they need to optimize project execution, ensure budget adherence, and achieve strategic project goals. With the integration of SAP Project and Resource Management, resource managers are equipped with optimal staffing requirements for enterprise projects providing a higher level of efficiency and accuracy in managing project teams 

 

 

Topics Under Discovery 

To improve the offerings we have at SAP, we have a program in place which looks at topics that were raised as part of the Customer Engagement Initiative. Here we currently have two under discovery for which our customers had the biggest interest and for which we’d like to get your feedback.  

  1. Automated Planned Costs and Revenues  

The first topic focuses on automated planned costs and revenues. Currently, users must manually upload costs and revenues using tools like SAC planning or Excel sheets into the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition system. The aim is to enhance this process by deriving planned costs from logistics data and sales orders, enabling a streamlined automatic integration. 
 
     2. Settlement from Projects with Revenue​ 

The second topic of discovery involves the settlement of projects with revenue. Presently, only overhead and investment projects have settlement capabilities. However, there has been interest from clients to extend this functionality to revenue-generating projects as well. The exploration here involves understanding of customer requirements for both simple and complex settlements, including revenue recognition impacts.  

 

Please reach out if you want to receive more information as we aim to incorporate feedback from experienced project financial controllers and managers to steadily improve our offerings. 

 

 

 

The Future of Business, Today: Get Your Access to AI-Assisted Features Thanks to this Limited Promotion Now!  

The 2502 update is a strategic investment that combines advanced AI with powerful enterprise management tools. Whether scaling your business, enhancing productivity, or building sustainable operations, its capabilities help support a more agile and resilient future. 

Sign up for following features through the limited Promotion for AI-assisted Features in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (for all countries, customers, and partners): 

  • The easy filter and smart summarization features in SAP Fiori allow for efficient, natural language filtering of business data and seamless summarization capabilities, enabling users to quickly extract relevant information and jump-start subsequent collaboration.  
  • Facilitate easier understanding and interpretation of financial data with insights from cost center reviews and explanations of fixed-asset depreciation keys. 

 

 

More Information 

If you are interested in the latest and greatest blog posts on Enterprise Portfolio and Project Management, please have a look at my collection blog and also take a look at the Community page for Enterprise Portfolio and Project Management (Project Control). 

 

Watch the Replays of Our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 Early Release Series!    

Between January 21 and January 24, we conducted a series of 21 engaging live sessions to showcase the thrilling innovations included in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 release. If you missed the live sessions, don't worry! You can still access the whole series or select the sessions that interest you the most. Seize this opportunity to watch them on demand at your convenience – anywhere, anytime.   

   

🔎Find All of Our Assets    

SAP S/4HANA Cloud is the foundation of the intelligent, sustainable enterprise and is an innovative, robust, and scalable ERP. We at Cloud ERP Product Success and Cloud Co-Innovation offer a service as versatile as our product itself. Check out the numerous offerings our team has created for you below:

entry.title: Re: Flush method is sap mdg fpm
entry.content: Hi, Thanks for the clarification and for get_data method it calls around 6 times and can you suggest on any additional check to be added so that the get_data runs only once. Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Rebate to be only provided till the specified value |...
entry.content:
Hi Gauthier,

In the previous post i wanted a rebate only over the scale value and in this question i need to be only below the value.

But now that i guess its also a graduated scale which is not supported and would need a custom pricing routine.

Thanks,

Priya

entry.title: SAP IRF & ZTABLE
entry.content:
Hello, good day.

We are working on SAP IRF and are able to generate a standard model, for example, for FI_ACCRECV.

The question arises in this situation: we want to generate a model that contains only specific data from the table ZCYIIISGD_COMLOT. The problem is that we are unable to determine which ILM object includes this table.

So, the options we have left are the following:

  1. Create a custom ILM object (type Z) that includes this table.
  2. Find out which existing ILM object uses this table.
  3. ?

If anyone can provide any insight, it would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance.

Best regards.

entry.title: Special Edition on Data Federation and the KSA Data Center
entry.content:
Managing global supply chains has become a challenging task in the context of increased costs and disruptions. Transparency and effective communication along the supply chain have become invaluable. Hence, businesses have more and more applied could solutions to transact through global digital networks, extend visibility and establish resilience across their operations.

As you might have learned from Joern Keller’s recent blog on ‘Data Federation: Bringing New Meaning to the Adage “Think Globally, Act Locally”’, we brought our network to the next level, turning it into a distributed, decentralized, and federated network. Data federation has been enabled for our solutions SAP Business Network for Logistics and SAP Business Network Asset Collaboration. And the solutions are now also available on KSA (Kingdom of Saudi Arabia) data center SA30.

This blog will dive into the details. I will compare before- and after-scenarios, describe the new scenarios that are now possible with the availability on the KSA data center, and explain how shippers/solution owners/asset operators (hereinafter called shippers) and carriers/data contributors/OEMs and contractors (hereinafter called carriers) can manage data federation.

But first, let’s get on the same page …

 

What is data federation?

Data federation provides operational information to be accessed and updated as though it resided in a single data center. It ensures availability across regions and data centers with high scalability, and performance.

SAP Business Network for Logistics, which includes the solutions SAP Business Network Freight Collaboration, SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace and SAP Business Network, intelligent insights add on, as well as SAP Business Network Asset Collaboration are currently available on data centers EU10, US20, and SA30. Data federation allows businesses to collaborate across these data centers and regions, while providing local data residency.  

How does data federation change collaboration between business partners?

With the 2412 release, SAP Business Network has been modernized and turned into a decentralized, federated network. Before, shippers had to be on the same data center as their carriers. Collaboration across data centers was not supported.

 Before – collaboration between data centers was not possible (KSA data center was not yet available)

 Now, business data can be exchanged across data centers. Shippers can join from their preferred local home data center and establish collaboration with business partners (carriers) across the globally federated trading partner directory.

 After – collaboration between data centers is possible (graphic does not include scenarios with KSA data center)

What additional scenarios are possible with the KSA data center?

SAP Business Network for Logistics and SAP Business Network Asset Collaboration are now also available on KSA data center SA30 to serve public sector and Critical National Infrastructure (CNI) organizations. Shippers in the region, can now be compliant with data isolation regulation requirements.

 Collaboration scenario with KSA data center

Please note even if the carrier company is physically located in KSA, the account creation would happen in the US or EU data center, as the SA30 data center is dedicated to public sector and CNI companies.

 

How to manage data federation as shipper?

As a shipper, you can join SAP Business Network from your preferred home data center. To establish cross data center connections, you must ensure that the business profile is available in all data centers on the network.

In the ‘Manage Business Profile’ app, bring up your own profile and ‘Replicate to global regions of SAP Business Network’. Once enabled, the setting cannot be reversed. Future updates will be synchronized to all data centers. Additional details can be found on SAP Help Portal: Profile Settings | SAP Help Portal

 How to manage data federation as a shipper

To select a business partner operating in a different data center in the ‘Discover Business Partners’ app, you must first ensure that your company profile is available across all data centers.

Note: This feature is only available when the multi-cloud environment of SAP Business Technology Platform is used as integration platform.

 

How to manage data federation as a carrier?

During registration, carriers can select the data center on which they want to register their account. When the account has been created after December 16th, 2024, the profile is set to ‘public’ by default (the profile visibility for existing accounts remains unchanged).

The profile is automatically federated globally (this can be manually deselected), so they can be found by shippers in another data center.

Please note: There has been a UI change with regards to privacy settings. Carriers no longer find them in the ‘Manage Invitations’ app. To change the privacy settings, go to the ‘Manage Business Profile’ application and select ‘Options’. Select or deselect ‘Show my profile in search results’.

 How to manage data federation as a carrier.

entry.title: Re: How to do SELECT SINGLE/SELECT UP TO 1 ROWS using CDS
entry.content: A note about "Tables with more than two key fields": I think "concat(werks, lgort)" is risky. If "werks" has spaces at the end, "substring( Z_I_MARDFirstRow.firstRowKey, 1, 4 )" and "substring( Z_I_MARDFirstRow.firstRowKey, 5, 4 )" will give incorrect results.

entry.title: Re: Flush method is sap mdg fpm
entry.content: Well, if it calls the get_data multiple times it usually should be related to a specific event. You can check for the event and only interact with the ones you need. If that is not possible, you could check if the current call is raised by you own UI with parameter iv_raised_by_own_ui. If you want to get rid of some of the calls, a deep analysis and understanding of the application would be required.

entry.title: Do you talk funny? - What Stand-up Comedy and Business Presentations (should) have in common
entry.content:
I honestly never really thought about bringing together business presentations and stand-up comedy. This somehow doesn’t fit at all, was my first thought when my esteemed colleague recommended me a Google Talk by David Nihill. David Nihill himself, according to his own statement, has terrible stage anxiety. He hates speaking in front of people and he speaks incredibly fast (and that with a lovely Irish accent). The first half minute of his speech, he seems unprepared, hands in his pockets, and just prattles away. All in all, not exactly the classic well-trained stage speaker.

 

“You never overcome your fear of Public Speaking.”

Nevertheless, after those awkward thirty seconds, his speech captivates me. He tells a story. It is his story and how he overcomes his own limits. About how he—the man who was famous for his stage fails during his time at university— went abroad, pretended to be a comedian and by that became a stage performer. Despite this, he says, he has never overcome the fear of public speaking. He simply learned to manage it.

 

Correlation between stand-Up Comedy and business presentations

David Nihill manages his fear via stand-up comedy techniques. This not only makes his talk incredibly entertaining, but also memorable. His techniques are easy to use and don’t miss their effect: I was able to reduce the number of filler words in my presentations to zero with his tip.

So, if you also have “pigeons in your chest” instead of butterflies, or even finish your presentations with Q&As instead of a conclusion (a major mistake, he proclaims), David Nihill’s Google Talk is definitely worth a look!

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM awarness sessions 2025 - What is in it & upcoming schedule

Good Day to you,

can you try to share the link to view the recording  of the  above event.

Hemant Vaswani

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4 HANA iDoc CREDAT and CRETIM format changes sending via ALE
entry.content: If you connect through RFC, then the receiver function doesn't receive dates and times in YYYY-MM-DD and HH:MM:SS formats, the RFC function receives in the RFC protocol formats (if it's ABAP, it's types D and T which correspond to YYYYMMDD and HHMMSS). Please clarify where you see YYYY-MM-DD and HH:MM:SS formats, and what's the exact chain between the RFC call and where you see these formats.

entry.title: UK ECP Parallel Run & UK UAT Test Scripts
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I am training to be an SAP ECP Implementation Consultant also I am shadowing our technical consultant on my first ECP implementation project. (Studying C_HRHPC.) 

The Employee Central Payroll project is for UK – I am looking for guidance/assistance:

A ‘’Parallel Run’’ with the client’s bureau is part of the project plan, I want to understand the concept and what it entails to advance my knowledge.

Please can you point me in the right direction for documentation on the processing quality data and SBP requirements to successfully complete a parallel run, any materials or links to documents will be immensely helpful. I have looked on SAP for Me and there is so much information I am unsure if I am looking at the correct docs.

 

UAT UK Test Scripts:

I have the USA SBP PCC/Payroll testing scenarios – I am now converting USA to UK – this is very timely please see an example below:

Payroll Driver (USA) screen (accessed using transaction code PC00_M10_CALC) change as 

Payroll Driver (UK) screen (accessed using transaction code PC00_M08_CALC)

Does anyone have any material or suggestions in simplifying the creation of the UK Test scripts?

Any assistance is appreciated.

Many thanks in advance

Lisa

entry.title: Re: How to add stock into Third Party Warehouse
entry.content:
Dear @MariusSiegel,

Is there an option to upload initial stock in relation with scope item 1ZQ  from S/4H Public Cloud? 

Stock upload through Migration Cockpit is not possible, we are aware that an inbound delivery is created and has to be confirmed in the 3rd party WMS. Only option we see at the moment is through transaction MIGO. But since the amount of material documents this is not an option.

Kind regards,

Rick

entry.title: Re: material availability date is before sales order crea...
entry.content:
Hello @Jayd_SAP 

See the following notes:

3551399 - ATP Confirmation Date in the Past for Sales Orders

The issue arises when there are no 'X' in the field DlvSchdlg and TranspSchd flag in transaction OVLY for order type.

 

2221849 - Customizing and process flow of SD scheduling

Material Availability date
In case of backwards scheduling: material availability date = loading date – pick pack time
In case of forwards scheduling: material availability date = loading date – pick pack time or current date

 

If all else fails, debug according to the note 2220102 - Debugging guide for SD scheduling

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: How to use I_ProductTP_2 in mock-framework?
entry.content:
Hi,

i have got a functionality that at some point in time also updates the material master using MODIFY ENTITY ... UPDATE on I_ProductTP_2. 

I want to get that functionality under automated test, but I don't seem to be able to actually mock the data in a way that it can be updated.

This is what I've done:

 

METHOD class_setup.
 sql_test_environment = cl_osql_test_environment=>create( i_dependency_list = VALUE #( ( 'I_ProductTP_2' ) ) ).
ENDMETHOD.
METHOD my_test.
 TYPES tty_product_ids_wr TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF I_ProductTP_2 WITH DEFAULT KEY.
 sql_test_environment->insert_test_data( i_data = VALUE tty_product_ids_wr( ( Product = '990000000000000001' ) ) ).
 sql_test_environment->insert_test_data( i_data = VALUE tty_product_ids_wr( ( Product = '990000000000000002' ) ) ).
ENDMETHOD.

 

So If I now SELECT from I_ProductTP_2, then my inserted products are perfectly there, but if I run the following, I get a "404 not found" error:

 

MODIFY ENTITY I_ProductTP_2
  UPDATE FIELDS ( ProductOldID )
  WITH VALUE #( ( %key-Product       = '990000000000000001'
                  %data-ProductOldID = '990000000000000002' ) )
  FAILED FINAL(failed) ##NEEDED
  REPORTED FINAL(reported) ##NEEDED.

 

So: what am I doing wrong here? If I try to use the CDS-Test-Environment for I_ProductTP_2 the test crashes because one of the underlying CDSes if I_ProductTP_2 must not be used with the CDS-Test-Environment for some unexplained reason.

To me this looks pretty broken on SAP-side, but maybe I am just missing out something here?

entry.title: Re: Include structure in TYPES declaration
entry.content:
The right syntax is 

    TYPES: BEGIN OF tt_hpath_custo,
             zrate TYPE zsd_satis-zrate.   "WITH a POINT
             INCLUDE TYPE vbpavb.
    TYPES: END OF tt_hpath_custo.

entry.title: Re: Custome field (Indicator type or Check box) shows incorrectl on reports.
entry.content: I have same question? Have you got the answer of your question?

entry.title: Edocument framework installiation 3005076 note deleted cl_edocument super class
entry.content:
Dear experts,

We are currently implementing Edocument framework for an S4hana 105 1 SP system.
Unfortunately TCI usage is not available in this system. We started implementing the notes manually.
We are at 3005076 note Document Compliance Framework (27) what deleted everything from cl_edocument definition.  That class is needed and we can't complete the implementation without this class.  (In other systems where we used TCI we did not face any issue with this class).

Do you have any advice or idea what step are missing?

 

we are following this list:

Reference: List of SAP Notes included in the TCI | SAP Help Portal

The prerequisites notes are implemented correctly.

entry.title: Re: Time Account Balances SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi,

Search import/export data-choose export data-Select Generic Object as TIME ACCOUNT DETAILS-include independents no

then you will get a file that we can extract for all employees that will show the account posting data for each day

entry.title: Re: SF- LMS APIs : Unable to hit the API from postman
entry.content: thank you it works, Do you have any suggestions fpr Learning Item details too ? When I follow the example from SAP I get only request is not authorized

entry.title: Re: Mass maintenance in KNB5
entry.content: Hello Ikloski, what practical solution would you suggest to mass create the KNB5 areas in the first place ?

entry.title: Re: Individual Purchase order
entry.content:
Hi,

For Individual Purchase order

1.Item category group is BANC

2. Item category is TAB --> TAB determined based on 

            Sales Doc type - OR

            Item category group - BANC

             Item Usage - NIL

            Higher-level item category - NIL

Here we have Special Stock indicator - E  : It controls when you doing delivery system will consider Sales Order Stock.

3. Schedule line Category - CB (Determined based on Item Category + MRP Type)

 in CB we have few controls 

A. Movement Type - 601

B. Item Relevant for delivery check box

C. Order type - NB --> it will help to generate PR automatically in the background when you save the order.

D. Item Category - 0 --> If you do MIGO it consider as actual MIGO and stocks will be updated.

E. Account assignment category - E --> even if you do delivery system will not generate inventory document and cost of goods will be directly assign to that particular sales order number

F. Purchase requestion delivery schedule check box - it will help to copy the schedule line data sales order to PR

4. Requirement Type - KEB

5. Requirement class - KEB - here we have few controls

A. Special stock indicator - E - Stock will reserved to that particular sales order number

B. Account assignment category - E-->even if you do MIGO system will not generate inventory document and cost of goods will be directly assign to that particular sales order number

Regards,

Rajasekhar

entry.title: Re: Error during import of clipboard contents
entry.content:
As already answered in the forum many times, this function module can't work in background, because it's based on OLE to connect to the Excel application installed on the user's laptop, and in background it's impossible to connect to the user's laptop (like e.g. impossible to use GUI_UPLOAD, etc.)

Depending on the Excel file format, there are several workarounds:

  • If it's a text format like CSV or tab-separated fields, you may upload the file to the application server before running the job, and you use OPEN DATASET, READ DATASET, etc. to read the text lines and fields.
  • For other formats, you may use any solution like abap2xlsx or XCO for XLSX format, custom XML transformations if it's an XML-like format, etc.

entry.title: Assistance Required with Email Sending Authorization in RAP-Based Application
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I have developed a RAP-based application for S/4HANA Public Cloud and added an action button for sending emails. During debugging, I encountered an authorization issue within the method used for email sending.

Despite the user having the BR_ADMINISTRATOR role assigned, the issue persists. I would greatly appreciate your assistance in resolving this authorization problem.

For better clarity, I’ve included some lines of code where I checked the authorization. Instead of receiving a value of 0 in sy-subrc, I got a value of 12. I’ve also attached the relevant screenshots for your reference.

Looking forward to your support.

Best regards,
Varun Tyagi

entry.title: My app can not export PDF anymore after Windows 11 update (24H2 - 26.100.3037)
entry.content:
It is a old VB6 app, but have been running for years (from 2003)  and the customer loves it. It even run perfect until a few days ago, when there was Windows 11 update.

It is confermed by the user that 23H2 - No problem. 24H2 - can not export.

It is possible to see the report, but it is not possible to export to PDF.

I get a dialog box withe heading: "Crystal REpoer Viewer", The message is: "Failed to export the report"

My CRViewer.dll has version 11.0.0.1282

I someone else experience this problem?
What can I do to fix it (other than rollback the windows update)?

entry.title: Re: SAP ByDesign Api - Upload Attachment
entry.content:
Can you check if the following works for you?

<soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://www.w3.org/2003/05/soap-envelope" xmlns:glob="http://sap.com/xi/SAPGlobal20/Global" xmlns:a00="http://sap.com/xi/AP/CustomerExtension/BYD/A0014" xmlns:glob1="http://sap.com/xi/AP/Globalization">
<soap:Header/>
<soap:Body>
<glob:MaterialBundleMaintainRequest_sync_V1>
<BasicMessageHeader></BasicMessageHeader>
<!--1 or more repetitions:-->
<Material actionCode="06">
<InternalID>P100001</InternalID>
<AttachmentFolder DocumentListCompleteTransmissionIndicator="false" ActionCode="06">
<Document PropertyListCompleteTransmissionIndicator="false" ActionCode="01">
<VisibleIndicator>true</VisibleIndicator>
<!--Optional:-->
<CategoryCode>2</CategoryCode>
<!--Optional
<TypeCode>10011</TypeCode>:-->
<!--Optional
<MIMECode>text/plain</MIMECode>:-->
<!--Optional:-->
<Name>Test.txt</Name>
<!--Optional:-->
<AlternativeName>Test.txt</AlternativeName>
<!--Optional:-->
<FileContent ActionCode="01">
<!--Optional:-->
<BinaryObject mimeCode="text/plain" characterSetCode="UTF?">*Base64BinaryString*</BinaryObject>
</FileContent>
</Document>
</AttachmentFolder>
</Material>
</glob:MaterialBundleMaintainRequest_sync_V1>
</soap:Body>
</soap:Envelope>

entry.title: Re: Fetch duplicate records from database table
entry.content:
This below code (that anybody can test) compiles in a class in an ABAP program in Standard ABAP. It will fail if you enter this ABAP SQL statement in a non-ABAP code.

 

    TYPES: BEGIN OF ts_sql,
             carrid TYPE s_carr_id,
             count  TYPE i,
           END OF ts_sql.
    DATA lt_sql TYPE TABLE OF ts_sql.
    SELECT carrid COUNT(*) INTO TABLE lt_sql FROM sflight 
        GROUP BY carrid HAVING COUNT(*) > 1.

 

The below code works with ABAP for Cloud development:

        TYPES: BEGIN OF ts_sql,
                 product TYPE i_product-product,
                 count   TYPE i,
               END OF ts_sql.
        DATA lt_sql TYPE TABLE OF ts_sql.
        SELECT product, COUNT(*)
          FROM i_product
          GROUP BY product
          HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
          INTO TABLE @LT_sql.

entry.title: Re: AGING REPORT FOR ACCOUNTS PAYABLE IS NOT WORKING IN S...
entry.content: @agaco_1028 Was this problem solved?

entry.title: App Development & Automation with SAP BTP in 2025
entry.content:
In today’s fast-paced business environment, optimizing applications, app development, and automation processes is crucial for maintaining a competitive edge.

This webcast explores strategies and best practices for harnessing the power of SAP BTP.

Join us as we dive into the core elements of SAP BTP App Development and Automation. Whether you’re a developer, IT expert, or business strategist, this session provides valuable insights to make your work more efficient. 

Register: https://events.sap.com/sap-btp-2025/en/home

entry.title: Re: IPS Trasformation add Org Member Roles
entry.content:
Hello @TobiasTheiner 

That was helpful.

The error is gone, but no org members are written.

User Read Read 1
User Write Skipped 1
I am also using the default transformation. I pinned the group condition as a test.
"group": { "condition": '('%btp.cf.pm.group.prefix%' === 'null') || ($.displayName =~ /%btp.cf.pm.group.prefix%%btp.cf.pm.landscape%.+/)",
"mappings": [....
I did not set the %btp.cf.pm.group.prefix% property.
%btp.cf.pm.group.prefix% then this is null.
My IAS group is called BTP_CF_PM_12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789101112_org_manager
Org ID= 12345678-1234-1234-1234-1234-123456789101112
Pattern BTP_CF_PM_ORGID_ORGRole ias.group.filter=displayName eq "BTP_CF_PM_".

Best regards Dirk

entry.title: Re: Extension wizard not working
entry.content: I have the same situation. I followed all the instructions and got the same message: "Missing Configuration."

entry.title: Re: Custom HDM: Implementation BADI_HDM_CUSTOM_ENABLE exa...
entry.content:
Good Morning,

Thanks for this late answer 🙂

Your documentation is quite different from what I performed:
SE18 -> Badi Name:BADI_HDM_CUSTOM_ENABLE -> Create
Enhancement Spot: ZES_HDM_ATTACHMENTS
Composite Enhancement Spot: ZES_HDM_ATTACHMENTS
Create Composite Spot
Composite Enhancement Spot: ZES_HDM_ATTACHMENTS
Short Text: Enable Custom HDM
Package: ZBC
Save
Save
Enhancement Implementation -> Activate
Enh. Spot Element Definitions -> Create Badi
Name: ZES_HDM_ATTACHMENTS
Description: Activate Custom HDM
Enh. Spot Element Definitions -> Right Click on BADI_HDM_CUSTOM_ENABLE
-> Create Badi implementation
Implementation -> Right Click -> Create Badi implementation
Badi Implementation: ZES_HDM_ATTACHMENTS
Description: Activate Custom HDM
Implementing Class: ZCL_HDM_CUSTOM_ENABLE
Implementing Class -> Double Click -> Create Implementation
---
method IF_HDM_CUSTOM_ENABLE~CHECK_HDM_CUSTOM_ENABLE.
EV_ENABLE = 'X'.
endmethod.
---
Save
Activate
Back -> Activate

Have a nice day.

entry.content:
Hi All , 

I am working with Risk-Based Authentication with account locked , with X number of failed attempts during a time period , i saw notes from SAP specifying that the clientContext is required , my integration is server to server , what does it means by adding clientContext - {clientIP: "0.0.0.0"} , we are not interacting via client , so what value value to be passed ?what is the impact of passing clientIP?

 

Many Thanks,

Ruchita

entry.title: Re: M-series Apple Chip MacBooks and Abap Platform Trial containers using Docker and Podman
entry.content:
@dylan-drummond  A short update from my side. 

With Docker/Orbstack for Mac it is currently possible to run the 1909 image natively. 

The 2022 is still not working. Basically the hdbdaemon is not starting, based on the error message, I've the gut feeling that this is more related to this bug. https://github.com/docker/for-mac/issues/7058
As the error message is indicating that under pid768 something like hdbdaemon is expected and received something like rosetta/hdbdaemon. If this hypothesis is true, then not sure where to search, either docker container startup script or sapstart. Currently I've not that much time to investigate (and limited knowledge their)  But, I've the feeling that not much is missing to get the 2022 image running as well. 
@julieplummer20Do you guys have any hints? 
Bests Tom

entry.title: SAP MM
entry.content:
due to annual stock report to supplier X000000XX, we have found that quantity reported via EDI inventory report is different from quantity shown in our SAP (transaction MB5B). The concerned date is 31.12.2024. Material X000000XX(X000000XX). Quantity reported via EDI is 14 682 pcs and SAP shows 13 842 pcs. Both only report on Consignment stock, nothing else. Plant xxxx.
Quantity in IDOC on 31st dec is 14682.
And MB5B report with same date ha quantity 13842.
So difference of 840 quanity in IDOC and MB5B.

Why this is happening?
Which quantity should be correct?

entry.title: Re: SUBSTRING in ABAP
entry.content:
of course, yes. Try this

  SELECT field1, field2, 
    substring( field3, 1, 6 ) AS v_subfield3
      FROM table1 WHERE conditions

entry.title: LMS API - LearningItemDetails
entry.content:
Dear,

maybe someone have a suggestion for me what I'm misisng.  I tried the documentation example to receive the LearningItemDetails via api (admin token) from the LMS module. 

learningPlan/v1/LearningItemDetails?$filter=lisCriteria/itemID eq '<id>' and lisCriteria/itemTypeID eq '<type>' and lisCriteria/revisionDate eq <revisiondate>

But I receive on the error :  ERROR:  The request is not authorized, please try again\n"

Which kind of authorization is needed or reference ? 

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Product Compliance - SVT - affected applications vers...
entry.content:
Hello Harry,

in Substance Volume Tracking we use the following logic:

Starting from the logistic material which we extract from a material document, we determine the assigned packaged product (CCI) and the assigned unpackaged product (CCI). Then we determine the applications which are maintained at the unpackaged product. As next step we determine based on various criteria under which regulation (compliance requirement) the logistic material is tracking relevant. Once we know the relevant compliance requirement we determine from the definition of the compliance requirement the exempted applications. Then we compare the applications from the unpackaged product with the exempted application from the compliance requirement definition. If we see that all applications from the unpackaged product are maintained as exempted applications in the compliance definition, we conclude that the logistic material is not tracking relevant for the given regulation (compliance requirement).
If there is at least one application maintained at the unpackaged product which is not maintained as exempted application in the compliance requirement definition, then we consider the logistic material as tracking relevant for the given regulation (compliance requirement) - additional checks will be performed to further evaluate the tracking relevance of logistic material (e.g. check exemptions in the marketability assessments).
If there is no application maintained at the unpackaged product, then we we consider the logistic material as tracking relevant for the given regulation (compliance requirement) - additional checks will be performed to further evaluate the tracking relevance of logistic material (e.g. check exemptions in the marketability assessments).
We only consider the applications on the level of an unpackaged product. We do currently not consider the applications which are visible at the raw material under the Where-Used Information section.
In Substance Volume Tracking we do not have any functionality which is evaluating the affected applications which are maintained in a compliance requirement definition.
To my understanding the affected applications which are maintained in a compliance requirement definition describe the main scope of the regulation.

I hope this helps.

Please let me know in case you have any additional questions.

Best regards,
Michael

entry.title: Re: Link between billing plan settlement line and invoice
entry.content: Match VBRP-FPLNR & VBRP-FPLTR with FPLT-FPLNR & FPLT-FPLTR resp.

entry.title: Re: My First Experience with LeanIX: A Newcomer’s Guide to EA Modeling After getting Certification
entry.content: Thanks @lorimer1 , Thanks @anandtigadikar

entry.title: Re: SAP MM
entry.content:
Hi,

The MB5B quantity (13,842 pcs) is likely correct as it reflects SAP’s finalized postings. The EDI discrepancy likely arose from timing or filtering issues. You need to Run MB51 (Stock Movement List) for the material and date to verify all movements and Check for late postings (e.g., goods issues after the IDOC was sent).

Regards

entry.title: Re: ABAP Dark Theme for NetWeaver
entry.content:
Thanks for that suggestion. I've use Solarize Dark previously but Dracula is also pretty good.

While plenty of people talk about Eclipse/ADT, it's a pretty awful tool compared with SE80 etc al, and while it may be SAP's direction of travel, here in 2025 plenty of people are still using the SAP GUI with ECC and Hana boxes because it's all we have or is the best tool for the job.

entry.title: Feel free to join the new Integration group in our community
entry.content:
You may have seen the announcement from SAP's Chief Product Officer for SAP Integration Suite about the launch of a new Integration group, a dedicated space within our SAP Community meant to collaborate across different integration topics.

Feel free to join this Integration group to exchange information, ask questions, post blogs posts etc. across different integration topics all under one hood, such as SAP Integration Suite and its capabilities like Cloud Integration, API Management, (Advanced) Event Mesh, Graph, etc., interface development as well as monitoring and error handling with SAP Application Interface Framework, integration strategy, etc.

What does this now mean for the topic pages such as the one for SAP Integration Suite?

Well, the topic pages remain, here you find all relevant information about the respective products like product documentation, roadmap information, new features, learning information, best practices, etc.

However, when accessing community content and creating new content, we have changed the navigation to ease the collaboration within the new Integration group. Let's check how this looks like for the SAP Integration Suite topic page.

The Community content menu now points to the new group. So, from here you can directly navigate to the Integration group.

The Create content has three entries:

  • You can Create a Question: this will create a new question below Technology Q&A which is automatically tagged with SAP Integration Suite. Note, this question won't show up in the group.
  • You can Start a Discussion: this is similar to asking a question but this time you navigate to the Discussion board of the Integration group.
  • You can Create a Blog Post: here you navigate to the Blog posts board of the Integration group where you are able to create a blog post which will then show up in the group.

By intention, we do not directly enter the discussion editor or the blog posts editor of the group but rather open the boards so that you are aware that you have navigated to the group. When you create a discussion or a blog post, don't forget to tag your post. Your content will show up in the group and depending on the tag also in the respective Community pages.

If you still like to access the Community pages, we have now added all links into the navigation pane of the topic page. Within the Community pages, you can also post content, but unfortunately this won't be shown in the group.

Enjoy collaboration! See you in the group then.

entry.title: Re: From Application Logging to Cloud Logging: Service Innovation Guide
entry.content:
Hi @Hariharan-Gandhi,

Thanks for the helpful insights in your blog! We are using a subscription-based Global Account, but SAP Cloud Logging is not available to us. Could you clarify how we can ensure a smooth transition and continue using a logging service after the deprecation?

Thanks in advance!

Best regards
Johannes

entry.title: Re: Step-by-Step Guide: Sending SAP Data to SAP Event Mesh in Integration Suite (EMIS). Codeless.
entry.content: Thank you @Benedikt_Sprung !

entry.title: Condition Contract: Customer who receives the rebate different to customers for turnover
entry.content:
Scenario: Customer A receives rebate for the turnover of customer B and C for certain materials, e.g.
3% for customer B material 1
5% for customer B material 2
10% for customer C material 1

I have created a condition contract for customer A, with the turnover selection for both customers B and C.
I have created 3 conditions with access sequence contract number, customer KUNNR, material:
customer B, material 1, 3%
customer B, material 2, 5%
customer C, material 1, 10%

Now when settling the contract, the bonus amount is 0. The system creates 2 line items in the settlement (one for material 1, one for material 2), and aggregates the total sales amount for BOTH customers in condition REBV of the settlement documents, and does not find any REB1-condition because it uses customer A to search for valid condition records.

How to make SAP use customers B and C to find a valid condition record?
How to make SAP to split the settlement into 3 lines?

A workaround solution would be to create 2 condition contracts, one for every customer whose turnover should be considered. But that is not my preferred solution, and in ECCS it would have been possible to cover above rebate scenario in 1 rebate agreement.

Can anyone help?

Thanks for your ideas!

entry.title: Re: How to use I_ProductTP_2 in mock-framework?
entry.content:
Hi Andre,

If you use the OSQL Test Environment, you're mocking the CDS View I_ProductTP_2 directly. If you use the CDS Test Environment, you mock the dependencies of CDS View I_ProductTP_2, which is used for testing CDS View I_ProductTP_2 itself.

If you however want to mock the RAP BO I_ProductTP_2 for EML statements, you have to use a RAP BO test double framework. Please see the help on the 2 different possibilities here: https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-development-tools-user-guide/managing-dependencies-on-rap-business-objects-with-abap-unit

BR,
Alex

entry.title: Re: Speed up a BAPI update
entry.content:
Hi Ricky,

You can use background jobs, in your program you can split your records into different batches, say for each batch you want 10k records, it means you will then create 20 bacthes that will run concurrently in the background, this will use what ever number of processes are available in your system, if the maximum work processes for example is 6, then this will process 6 batches which have 10k records in each concurrently, and when one batch completes the next batch in line processes.

 

I have done this for another project where I had to load business partners.

 

Regards,

Tshepo

entry.title: Re: How to upload sales area details in BP T-code using custom program
entry.content: what was the solution, I'm facing same issue.

entry.title: Accounting document not getting generated for standard return order (CBAR)
entry.content:
Hello All,

We need accounting documentation when processing customer return orders, and we also require order-specific stock details in the stock report (Display overview stock). Could you please assist us in setting this up in the system? If this is dependent on refund control and follow-up activities, please let us know which parameters we should configure. 

Note: We are trying to excute standard return process in SAP public cloud system, however when we are selecting Refund as decide later the followup doucment does not provide any accounting document which is causing issue from finance. As there are no accounting entires generated for PGR we are not able to check inventory entries.

Looking forward for any help!

Regards
Mandark R.

entry.title: Re: Obtaining completed learning items from LMS and keeping them in client database via LMS API
entry.content: KB was removed, any new one ?

entry.title: Re: WB2R_SC - Settlement document that reduces business v...
entry.content:
Within customizing item "Define and Configure Profiles for Business Volume Determination" it is possible to configure "Additional Business Volume Tables". SAP delivers the following tables for the business volume of settlement documents:

  • VWB2_WBRKWBRP_1 Business Volume Settlement Doc Supplier Rebate
  • VWB2_WBRKWBRP_2 Business Volume Settlement Document for Customer Rebate
  • VWB2_WBRKWBRP1S Business Volume CCS Docs Supplier Rebate
  • VWB2_WBRKWBRP2S Business Volume CCS Docs Customer Rebate

I assume that VWB2_WBRKWBRP2S is the best starting point for your requirement.

entry.title: Re: Problem Doing ODATA Request with XCSRF Token
entry.content: Thanks, I did this already. I found out if I switched from axios to https.

entry.title: Re: Risk-Based Authentication works by adding a clientCon...
entry.content:
Hi @Rvanjari ,

Good day.

In a server-to-server integration for Risk-Based Authentication (RBA) with account locking, SAP CDC requires clientContext.

What does clientContext mean in this scenario?

  • The clientIP helps SAP CDC assess risk factors such as unusual login locations.
  • If the end-user’s real IP is not available (common in server-to-server setups), "0.0.0.0" can be passed, but this may impact how RBA rules are applied.

Impact of passing "0.0.0.0" or omitting clientIP

  • Passing "0.0.0.0" may prevent risk-based IP evaluations (e.g., geolocation, anomaly detection).
  • Omitting clientIP could result in certain RBA rules not being enforced, reducing security effectiveness.

Best Practice

  • If possible, retrieve the originating client’s IP from headers and pass that value instead of "0.0.0.0".
  • Ensure compliance with GDPR and other data privacy regulations when storing or processing IP addresses.

Regards,
Preethi G
SAP CDC Consultant

entry.title: Re: Control Length of input fields - sap Rap
entry.content:
Hi,

use the multiLineText

 

@ui: { lineItem: [ { position: 30 } ],

identification: [ { position: 30 } ] }

@ui.multiLineText: true

Not2;

entry.title: I have issues integrating Crystal for visual studio sp 37 into .net 8.0
entry.content:
This is my approach, I need help to fix:

  1. All previous instances of crystal are uninstalled with Vs Studio 2022 running .net 8.0 framework duly closed.
  2. Download the new Service Pack 37 x64 for 2022 and beyond, Download Sp 37 Runtime MSI x64 and Merge modules
  3. Install them in sequence.
  4. Open Vs 2022.
  5. I cannot see Crystal Reports Viewer on the Toolbox. Adding using choose items, browse to the .net libraries installed- Error: Component added but disabled
  6. Is not this service pack compatible with .net 8.0? Does that mean I am lost in the jungle of integrating Crystal with Vs.2022?

I have great respect for Crystal Reports since ver 8.5. 

Any tech there to help?

entry.title: Re: Problem Doing ODATA Request with XCSRF Token
entry.content:
I found the answer. 

It was the change from axios to https. I did the request as following. Now it works for me.

const oHeaders = {
   "X-Csrf-Token": sAuthToken,
   Accept: req.headers.accept,
   "Content-Type": req.headers["content-type"] ?? "application/json",
   Cookie: aCookies.join(";"),
};

const response = await makeHttpsRequest({
                        method: "GET",
                        hostname: new URL(sUrl).hostname,
                        path: new URL(sUrl).pathname,
                        headers: oHeaders,
                    });

const makeHttpsRequest = (options, postData = null) => {
    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
        const req = https.request(options, res => {
            let data = "";
            res.on("data", chunk => (data += chunk));
            res.on("end", () => {
                resolve({
                    status: res.statusCode,
                    headers: res.headers,
                    data: data,
                });
            });
        });

        req.on("error", err => reject(err));
        if (postData) req.write(postData);
        req.end();
    });
};

entry.title: Re: SAP Private Link service use cases for SAP Cloud Integration and SAP Build Work Zone, Standard E
entry.content:
Hi @hterminasyan 

Thanks for the blog—it provides a better understanding of private links.

I have some questions regarding this topic in the context of Cloud Integration. If I understood correctly, with SAP Private Link, it is possible to establish a "private channel" between our private landscape S4/ECC systems and Cloud Integration iFlows, ensuring that data transmission does not traverse the public internet to reach the iFlow endpoints (Azure Blob Storage use case acting as an iflow consumer).

To my knowledge, however, the public endpoint of the iFlows would still exist. Is there any way to make the public endpoint completely unavailable and restrict access exclusively through this private channel? (Considering the Cloud Runtime, not the Edge Cell.)

Thanks in advance.

Mikel

entry.title: Re: WBS creation using CNMASSCREATE executing error
entry.content:
Without knowing the context, it's hard to understand what's happening. However, it seems like you're trying to modify the level of an existing WBS Element, either in the database or in the spreadsheet. It would be helpful if you could share the complete messages, the spreadsheet and the project in CJ20N.

Regards
Marcio Blos

entry.title: Re: Filter Value help results in Child entity based on pa...
entry.content: If your requirement is to purely pass the parent entity's value's to a child entity's value help I'd do this in the metadata extension of the item entity's field..

entry.title: Re: Filter Value help results in Child entity based on pa...
entry.content: If your requirement is to purely pass the parent entity's value's to a child entity's value help I'd do this in the metadata extension of the item entity's field.

entry.title: Re: DMC POD Plugin local development environment in VS Code
entry.content:
Hi @subrahmanyam_pampana 

Is there a way the tool can interact with batch requests? For GET requests, I have no problem (for example, metadata requests). However, I have a Smart Table in my plugin that interacts with an ODATA Service. The backend always responds with: "Batch request payload is invalid." Is there a way I can provide the payload in the post method of your extRoutes.js ?
